description: OVS is a Mexican American (Chicano) street gang based in Ontario, California, founded in the early 1950s. It consists of approximately 450 members and operates primarily in San Bernardino, Orange, Riverside, and Los Angeles counties. The gang is heavily involved in murder, drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and other violent crimes, and has deep ties to the Mexican Mafia.

country_links.evidence_quote: transporting narcotics from Mexico into the United States
country_links.context: OVS members transport narcotics from Mexico into the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: OVS ( Ontario Varrio Sur and also known as Onterio Varrio Sunkist ) is a Mexican American ( Chicano ) gang from Ontario, California
country_links.context: OVS is based in Ontario, California, and operates throughout southern California.
